description: Payment problems such as double charges, failed payments, and incorrect amounts requiring finance review.

scenarios.customer_message: I think I was charged twice for the same order.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry for the concern. Could you share your order ID and a payment screenshot so our team can review it?

scenarios.customer_message: The amount charged is higher than what I expected to pay.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I understand your concern. Please share your order ID and a payment screenshot so our team can look into it.

scenarios.customer_message: My payment failed but the money was deducted from my account.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: I'm sorry for the trouble. Could you share your order ID and a payment screenshot so our team can review this?

scenarios.customer_message: I paid but my order still shows as unpaid.
scenarios.expected_short_reply: Thanks for letting me know. Please share your order ID and a payment screenshot so our team can check on it.
